steps.title: Match the listing goal
steps.content: The student wants to list activities available on the Maple Ridge Trail. The relevant notes name three activities: biking, in-line skating, and cross-country skiing.

steps.title: Exclude off-goal details
steps.content: A and B focus on the trail's railroad-corridor origin. D mentions location and visitor access but not the activities. The sentence that lists biking, in-line skating, and cross-country skiing directly accomplishes the goal. The answer is C.
